attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
'AS BGM' AS CATEGORY,
SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,'NA') AS IS_L0_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,   
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,  
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FD2Y. FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
'N' AS CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG,
AS_BGM.SALES_REP_NUM,
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
COALESCE(IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM,'NA') AS IS_SALES_REP_NUM , 
COALESCE(IS_SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME, 'NA') AS IS_ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,       
BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
'Y' AS  SERVICE_FLG,
'N' AS  FMV_FLG,
'ADVANCED SERVICES' AS SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,
AS_BGM.SERVICE_GID AS ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
COALESCE(SUM(AS_BGM.DV_SH_PRO_BUDGET_REVENUE_AMT),0) AS AS_REVENUE_AMT,
COALESCE((SUM(AS_BGM.DV_SH_PRO_BUDGET_REVENUE_AMT) - SUM(AS_BGM.DV_SH_PRO_BUDGET_COST_AMT)),0) AS AS_BGM_TTL_AMT,     
CASE WHEN ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DV_IS_FLG,
/* Adding New Columns As part of Feb Release */
SHIER.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE ,
SHIER.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE,
/* Added New columns -Feb062020 */
'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_MOTION_CD,
0.0000000 AS  DV_NEW_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_NEW_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_RNWL_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_RNWL_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_OTHER_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_OTHER_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT,

/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/
CASE WHEN PRD.RU_BK_ACQSTN_CMPNY_NAME = 'Splunk' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SPLUNK_FLG
/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/



FROM $$SERVICEVWDB.MT_AS_SOLD_MARGIN AS_BGM
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SHIER
ON AS_BGM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD2Y
ON AS_BGM.DV_BOOKED_DT=FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDATE
ON 1=1
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE 
ON    AS_BGM.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY 
AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=BE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
AND BE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'   

/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN PRD 
ON AS_BGM.PRODUCT_KEY=PRD.ITEM_KEY
/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP SREP 
ON AS_BGM.SALES_REP_NUM = SREP.SALES_REP_NUM
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRCT_ST_INSIDE_SLS_ASGMT_LNK ALH
ON AS_BGM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND ALH.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT=(SELECT PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDATE WHERE PDATE.DUMMY_COLUMN_PI='Y')
AND AS_BGM.SALES_REP_NUM = ALH.BK_DR_SLS_TER_ASMT_SLS_REP_NUM
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN  IS_SHIER
ON IS_SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = ALH.INSIDE_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND  IS_SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP  IS_SREP
ON ALH.BK_INSIDE_SALES_REP_NUM = IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM
WHERE FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-3 AND PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND AS_BGM.SERVICE_GID IN ('AS TRANSACTION','AS SUBSCRIPTION','AS FIXED')
GROUP BY 
SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,'NA'),   
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'),  
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FD2Y. FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
FD2Y.FISCAL_QTR_AGE,
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
AS_BGM.SALES_REP_NUM,
COALESCE(IS_SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME, 'NA'),
COALESCE(IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM,'NA'),
BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
AS_BGM.SERVICE_GID, 
CASE WHEN ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END,
/* Adding New Columns As part of Feb Release */
SHIER.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE ,
SHIER.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE,
/* Added New columns -Feb062020 */
SALES_MOTION_CD,

/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/
SPLUNK_FLG
/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/

SELECT
'NCB' AS CATEGORY,
SH.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE AS L0,
SH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR AS L1,
SH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR AS L2,
SH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR AS L3,
SH.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR AS L4,
SH.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR AS L5,
SH.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR AS L6,
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,'NA') AS IS_L0_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,   
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,  
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
'N' AS CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG,
NCB.SALESREP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUM,
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
COALESCE(IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM,'NA') AS IS_SALES_REP_NUM ,  
COALESCE(IS_SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME, 'NA') AS IS_ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,    
BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
--NCB.SERVICE_FLAG AS SERVICE_FLG,
COALESCE(SUM(NCB.DV_NCB_COMP_NET_USD_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT),0) BKGS_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN DV_NCB_ORDER_STATUS_CD <> 'ENTERED' THEN (COALESCE(NCB.DV_NCB_COMP_NET_USD_AMT,0)*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) ELSE 0 END ),0) AS CCP_DISC,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN DV_NCB_ORDER_STATUS_CD = 'ENTERED' THEN (COALESCE(NCB.DV_NCB_COMP_NET_USD_AMT,0)*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) ELSE 0 END ),0) ENB,        
CASE WHEN ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DV_IS_FLG,
/* Adding New Columns As part of Feb Release */
SH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE ,
SH.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE,
/* Added New columns -Feb062020 */
'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_MOTION_CD,
0.0000000 AS  DV_NEW_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_NEW_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_RNWL_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_RNWL_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_OTHER_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_OTHER_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT

FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCAA_NCB_TV NCB 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_NCB_TV SOL 
ON  NCB.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
AND NCB.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=SOL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
--AND NCB.PROCESS_DT=SOL.PROCESS_DT 
AND NCB.SERVICE_FLAG IN ('Y','N')    
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD2Y 
ON FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE=NCB.PROCESS_DT    
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDATE
ON 1=1
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SH 
ON  SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=NCB.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE 
ON  NCB.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY 
AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=BE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT 
AND BE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'   
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP SREP 
ON NCB.SALESREP_NUMBER=SREP.SALES_REP_NUM  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRCT_ST_INSIDE_SLS_ASGMT_LNK ALH
ON NCB.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND ALH.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT=(SELECT PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDATE WHERE PDATE.DUMMY_COLUMN_PI='Y')
AND NCB.SALESREP_NUMBER = ALH.BK_DR_SLS_TER_ASMT_SLS_REP_NUM
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN  IS_SHIER
ON IS_SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = ALH.INSIDE_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND  IS_SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP  IS_SREP
ON ALH.BK_INSIDE_SALES_REP_NUM = IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM
WHERE NCB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','ATTRIBUTED') 
AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-3 AND PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND 1=2
GROUP BY
SH.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
SH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,'NA'),   
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'), 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'),  
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
FD2Y.FISCAL_QTR_AGE,
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
NCB.SALESREP_NUMBER,
COALESCE(IS_SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME, 'NA'),
COALESCE(IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM,'NA'),
BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
NCB.SERVICE_FLAG,          
CASE WHEN ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END,
/* Adding New Columns As part of Feb Release */
SH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE ,
SH.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE,
/* Added New columns -Feb062020 */
SALES_MOTION_CD

SELECT
'PRODUCT DISCOUNT' AS CATEGORY,
SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,'NA') AS IS_L0_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,   
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
COALESCE(IS_SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA') AS IS_L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,  
FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FW2Y. FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
'N' AS CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG,
BKGS.SALES_REP_NUM,
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
COALESCE(IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM,'NA') AS IS_SALES_REP_NUM ,    
COALESCE(IS_SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME, 'NA') AS IS_ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,     
BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
BKGS.FMV_FLG,
PRDT_CLSFTN.PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ELA_FLAG='Y' THEN (DV_ADJ_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT+DV_ADJ_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT)*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT
ELSE DV_ADJ_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT END ),0) AS DISC_NET_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(DV_ADJ_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT),0) AS DISC_LIST_AMT,
COALESCE((SUM(DV_ADJ_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT)  
- SUM(CASE WHEN ELA_FLAG='Y' THEN (DV_ADJ_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT+DV_ADJ_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT)*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT
ELSE DV_ADJ_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT END )),0) AS DISC_TTL_AMT,
COALESCE(SUM(DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT),0) AS DISC_FX_NET_AMT,
COALESCE((SUM((CASE WHEN DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT=0 THEN 0 ELSE DV_ADJ_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT END )*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT)  - SUM(DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT)),0) AS DISC_FX_TTL_AMT,
BKGS.DV_TRX_TYPE_CD,
BKGS.REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG  AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
CASE WHEN ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DV_IS_FLG,
/* Adding New Columns As part of Feb Release */
SHIER.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE ,
SHIER.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE,
/* Added New columns -Feb062020 */
'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_MOTION_CD,
0.0000000 AS  DV_NEW_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_NEW_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_RNWL_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_RNWL_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_OTHER_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_OTHER_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT,

/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/
CASE WHEN PRD.RU_BK_ACQSTN_CMPNY_NAME = 'Splunk' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SPLUNK_FLG
/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/


FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_ADJUSTED_DISCOUNT_WEEK BKGS 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_WEEK_TO_YEAR FW2Y 
ON BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT=FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDATE
ON 1=1
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC  BE 
ON   BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY 
AND FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=BE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT 
AND BE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SHIER 
ON SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
AND SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP SREP 
ON BKGS.SALES_REP_NUM = SREP.SALES_REP_NUM  
INNER JOIN
(
SELECT
 PRODUCT_KEY,
 BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD AS PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD,
 BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD AS PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
 CAST(ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS ALLOCATION_PCT,
 FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT 
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN PRDT, 
 $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR FQ2Y, 
 $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE IN_PDATE
 WHERE PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD<>'COGS' 
 AND PRDT.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD NOT IN ('REVENUE')
 AND PRDT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT=FQ2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT

Coalesce(Sum((
CASE	WHEN TSS_DISC.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID='RENEW' THEN TSS_DISC.DV_ADJ_COMP_US_STD_PRICE_AMT 
ELSE	0 END	)*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT     ),0) AS TSS_RENEWAL_DISC_LIST_AMT,

Coalesce((TSS_RENEWAL_DISC_LIST_AMT- TSS_RENEWAL_DISC_NET_AMT),0) AS TSS_RENEWAL_DISC_TTL_AMT,

Coalesce(Sum((CASE	WHEN TSS_DISC.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID='RENEW' THEN TSS_DISC.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT 
ELSE	0 END	)*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT),0) AS TSS_RENEWAL_DISC_FX_NET_AMT,
Coalesce(((
CASE	WHEN TSS_RENEWAL_DISC_FX_NET_AMT=0 THEN 0 
ELSE	TSS_RENEWAL_DISC_LIST_AMT 
END	) - TSS_RENEWAL_DISC_FX_NET_AMT),0) AS TSS_RENEWAL_DISC_FX_TTL_AMT,
Coalesce(Sum((
CASE	WHEN TSS_DISC.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID='UNKNOWN' THEN (TSS_DISC.DV_ADJ_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT+TSS_DISC.DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT) 
ELSE	0 
END	)*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT),0) AS TSS_OTHER_DISC_NET_AMT,
Coalesce(Sum((
CASE	WHEN TSS_DISC.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID='UNKNOWN' THEN TSS_DISC.DV_ADJ_COMP_US_STD_PRICE_AMT 
ELSE	0 
END	)*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT     ),0) AS TSS_OTHER_DISC_LIST_AMT,
Coalesce((TSS_OTHER_DISC_LIST_AMT - TSS_OTHER_DISC_NET_AMT),0) AS TSS_OTHER_DISC_TTL_AMT,
Coalesce(Sum((
CASE	WHEN TSS_DISC.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID='UNKNOWN' THEN TSS_DISC.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT 
ELSE	0 
END	)*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT),0) AS TSS_OTHER_DISC_FX_NET_AMT,
Coalesce(((CASE	WHEN TSS_OTHER_DISC_FX_NET_AMT=0 THEN 0 
ELSE	TSS_OTHER_DISC_LIST_AMT END) - TSS_OTHER_DISC_FX_NET_AMT),0) AS TSS_OTHER_DISC_FX_TTL_AMT,
TSS_DISC.DV_TRX_TYPE_CD,
TSS_DISC.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
CASE	WHEN ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE	'N'  END AS DV_IS_FLG,
/* Adding New Columns As part of Feb Release */
SHIER.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE ,
SHIER.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE,
/* Added New columns -Feb062020 */
'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_MOTION_CD,
0.0000000 AS  DV_NEW_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_NEW_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_RNWL_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_RNWL_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_OTHER_ANNUAL_BKGS_AMT ,
0.0000000 AS  DV_OTHER_MULTI_YR_BKGS_AMT,

/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/
CASE WHEN PRD.RU_BK_ACQSTN_CMPNY_NAME = 'Splunk' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SPLUNK_FLG
/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/


    
FROM $$STGDB.WI_MBR_TSS_DISC  TSS_DISC 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SHIER 
        ON	SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=TSS_DISC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_WEEK_TO_YEAR FW2Y 
        ON	TSS_DISC.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT=FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT 
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDATE 
        ON	1=1 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP SREP  
        ON	TSS_DISC.SALES_REP_NUM=SREP.SALES_REP_NUM 
    INNER JOIN ( 
SELECT	ITEM_KEY,FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,Sum(PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) AS PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT 
FROM	$$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC  be
WHERE	 BE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I' 
GROUP	BY 1,2,3,4,5 ) BE  
        
	ON	   TSS_DISC.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY  
        
	AND	TSS_DISC.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=BE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT 

INNER JOIN
(
SELECT
 PRODUCT_KEY,
 BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD AS PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD,
 BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD AS PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
 CAST(ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS ALLOCATION_PCT,
 FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT 
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN PRDT, 
 $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR FQ2Y, 
 $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE IN_PDATE
 WHERE PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD<>'COGS' 
 AND PRDT.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD NOT IN ('REVENUE')
 AND PRDT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT=FQ2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
 AND FQ2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN IN_PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-3 AND IN_PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
) PRDT_CLSFTN
ON TSS_DISC.PRODUCT_KEY=PRDT_CLSFTN.PRODUCT_KEY  
AND PRDT_CLSFTN.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT=FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT

/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN PRD 
ON TSS_DISC.PRODUCT_KEY=PRD.ITEM_KEY
/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/
	
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRCT_ST_INSIDE_SLS_ASGMT_LNK ALH 
        ON	TSS_DISC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
        AND	ALH.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT=(
        SELECT	 PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
        
FROM	   $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDATE 
        WHERE	  PDATE.DUMMY_COLUMN_PI='Y') 
        AND	TSS_DISC.SALES_REP_NUM = ALH.BK_DR_SLS_TER_ASMT_SLS_REP_NUM 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN  IS_SHIER 
        ON	IS_SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = ALH.INSIDE_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
        AND	 IS_SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE' 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP  IS_SREP 
        ON	ALH.BK_INSIDE_SALES_REP_NUM = IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM     
    WHERE	PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-3 
        
	AND	PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT 
    
GROUP	BY  
SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
Coalesce(IS_SHIER.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, 'NA'),
Coalesce(IS_SHIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'),
 Coalesce(IS_SHIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'),
 Coalesce(IS_SHIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'),
 Coalesce(IS_SHIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'),
 Coalesce(IS_SHIER.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'),
 Coalesce(IS_SHIER.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,'NA'),
FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FW2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FW2Y. FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FW2Y.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
FW2Y.FISCAL_QTR_AGE,
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
TSS_DISC.SALES_REP_NUM,
Coalesce(IS_SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,'NA'),
Coalesce(IS_SREP.SALES_REP_NUM, 'NA'),
BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
TSS_DISC.SERVICE_FLG,
TSS_DISC.FMV_FLG,
			PRDT_CLSFTN.PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
TSS_DISC.ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
TSS_DISC.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCRIPTION,
TSS_DISC.DV_MATCH_FLG,
TSS_DISC.DV_TRX_TYPE_CD,
TSS_DISC.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG, 
CASE	
    WHEN	ALH.DIRECT_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' 
    ELSE	'N' END,
				/* Adding New Columns As part of Feb Release */
SHIER.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE ,
SHIER.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE,
/* Added New columns -Feb062020 */
SALES_MOTION_CD,
/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/
SPLUNK_FLG
/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/

SUM(DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMT) AS TOTAL_BGM_NUM,
SUM(DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT) AS BGM_FX_NET_AMT,

SH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE ,
SH.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE,

'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_MOTION_CD,

$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN  BGM
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_MBR_PRODUCT_BGM_FMV BKGS_FMV
ON 
BGM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=BKGS_FMV.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY AND
BGM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=BKGS_FMV.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD AND
BGM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT=BKGS_FMV.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT AND
BGM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BKGS_FMV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND
BGM.PRODUCT_KEY=BKGS_FMV.PRODUCT_KEY AND
BGM.SALES_REP_NUM=BKGS_FMV.SALES_REP_NUM 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDATE
ON 1=1
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD2Y
ON FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE=BGM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT
AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-3 AND PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SH
ON SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BGM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP SREP 
ON BGM.SALES_REP_NUM=SREP.SALES_REP_NUM  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN PRD 
ON BGM.PRODUCT_KEY=PRD.ITEM_KEY
WHERE BGM.ADJUSTMENT_CD NOT LIKE 'LCLD%' 
AND BGM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD<>'AR'
GROUP BY 
SH.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
SH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FD2Y. FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
BGM.SALES_REP_NUM,
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
BGM.INTERNAL_BE_DESCR,
BGM.INTERNAL_SBE_DESCR,
PRD.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
COALESCE(BKGS_FMV.DV_FMV_FLG,'N'),
PRD.RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD,
PRD.SOFTWARE_STACK_CD,
PRD.MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD,
/* Adding New Columns As part of Feb Release */
SH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE ,
SH.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE,
/* Added New columns -Feb062020 */
SALES_MOTION_CD,
/*Splunk Identifier-June16th*/
SPLUNK_FLG
